itemName.zh: Vortex Razor HD Gen.2 1-6x24步枪瞄准镜

description.zh: 我一直在想我们上次聊的事情。随着文明的发展，人们真的变得更文明友善了吗？人们真的能携手共进吗？一直以来，我们相信哪里有文明，哪里的生活就变得更舒适方便。我们还相信我们会越来越不用担心朝不保夕，不用担心食不果腹。在没有威胁的环境下，展现人性的善良是很简单的。现在所有这些问题的答案就摆在我的眼前。塔科夫所发生的一切都在告诉我们，我们变得到底有多么“友善”。当能不能活着成为首要问题时，我们才知道原来真正正派的人并不比500年前更常见，可能现在还更少些。你觉得呢，你也是他们中的一员？好了，别想太多。我需要你帮我办件事。不管怎么说，干这行就要记忆很多很多东西，好好去练练你的记忆力，稍后我会联络你的。
description.en: I've been thinking about that thing we discussed last time. Have people really become kinder with the development of civilization? Do they really go hand in hand? All this time, where we believe there is civilization, life has become more comfortable, easier. There were increasingly fewer worries about safety or getting something to eat. It's easy to be humane when nothing is threatening you. The answer to these questions was right before my eyes. The situation in Tarkov has shown us how much kinder we have become. Once the issues of survival came to the front, it turned out that decent people aren’t more common than maybe 500 years ago. There're probably even fewer of them now. What do you think, are you one of them? Okay, don’t overthink it. I need you to do something for me. However, you will need to remember quite a lot for this job. Practice memorizing large volumes of information, I’ll contact you later.
